signals.headline: China's Q1 2026 GDP Grows 5% YoY, Beating Expectations of 4
signals.raw:
China's Q1 2026 GDP Grows 5% YoY, Beating Expectations of 4.8% | YES | HIGH confidence**  
China's official data released on April 16, 2026, confirmed first-quarter GDP growth at 5.0% year-on-year, surpassing Bloomberg estimates of 4.8% and the prior quarter's 4.5%.[1] This stronger-than-expected figure, amid Middle East conflict risks and IMF forecasts of 4.4% full-year growth, signals potential

signals.headline: SEC-CFTC Regulatory Framework Confirms XRP as Digital Commodity | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
SEC-CFTC Regulatory Framework Confirms XRP as Digital Commodity | YES | HIGH confidence**
A joint SEC-CFTC framework established on March 17, 2026, officially classified XRP as a digital commodity alongside Bitcoin and Ethereum, removing regulatory uncertainty that had previously constrained price action.[4]

signals.headline: XRP Payment Rail Launches in Japan | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
XRP Payment Rail Launches in Japan | YES | HIGH confidence**
On April 15, 2026, a payment rail connecting to 44 million Japanese wallets launched, representing institutional adoption infrastructure that did not exist during previous XRP recovery attempts.[4]

signals.raw:
NO recent breaking news confirmed, announced, or resolved about Cooper Flagg joining the Lakers or Cavaliers.**[1][2][4]

Flagg, the No. 1 pick playing for the **Dallas Mavericks**, recently ended his standout rookie season early due to an ankle injury in the finale against the Chicago Bulls, where he played only 9 minutes (10 PTS, 4 REB, 1 AST, 1 STL).[4]
